channel.title: language on Alexander Gaura
channel.description: Recent content in language on Alexander Gaura

item.title: A New Approach to English Spelling
item.description: window.onload = TextToIPA.loadDict('https://agaura.github.io/text-to-ipa/lib/ipadict.txt'); Excerpt Ål hjuumn beingz ar born fre and eicwl in dignody and riits. Ða ar øndoud wiþ reizn and cånsjonts and sjød act tordz wun ønuðr in a spirøt uv bruðrhod. Background Back in high school, I wanted to teach some friends some Polish words and phrases. Since sometimes I was doing this over text (in English, in the US), I needed a way to write Polish sounds into English so they could read it.
